case_title: HUU VAN NGUYEN VS. LIANG LIANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100156402)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-06-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-08-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-25-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-08-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66663887) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HUU VAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, LIANG DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-06-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-13-2021
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 66663887) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HUU VAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-25-2022 CONTINUED TO MAR-29-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-29-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
